headline: 1 Industrials Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Avoid
summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. Their momentum is also rising as lower interest rates have incentivized higher capital spending. As a result, the industry has posted a 19.2% gain over the past six months, beating the S&P 500 by 8.3 percentage points.
